stories.title: USMNT player ratings: Freeman a surprise hero with...
stories.summary: Strong performances from Tyler Adams and Malik Tillman also earned high USMNT ratings, but it was Alex Freeman who stood out in a win over Australia.

stories.title: U.S. sees off Australia, advances to WC knockouts
stories.summary: The U.S. shook off the absence of Christian Pulisic to beat Australia 2-0 in Seattle on Friday and clinch a spot in the World Cup knockout rounds.

stories.title: Titans, DT Simmons agree to $105M+ extension
stories.summary: The Titans and defensive tackle Jeffery Simmons have agreed to a 3-year, $105.8M extension, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter and NFL Network's Ian Rapoport and Mike Garafolo.

stories.title: Clark sets 36-hole U.S. Open Shinnecock record
stories.summary: Wyndham Clark followed up a 6-under 64 on Thursday with a 1-under 69 Friday on his way to breaking the 36-hole scoring record for a U.S. Open at Shinnecock.

stories.title: Toews, Stanley Cup and Olympic champ, retires
stories.summary: Jonathan Toews, a three-time Stanley Cup champion with the Blackhawks and two-time Olympic gold medalist with Canada, has announced his retirement.
